# Vyzma AI

> India's Premier AI Agency — AI chatbots, workflow automation, answer engine optimisation, and performance marketing for businesses in Bangalore & Visakhapatnam.

Vyzma AI builds intelligent systems that help Indian businesses grow faster. We combine cutting-edge AI with deep local market knowledge to deliver measurable results.

## Services

- [AI Chatbots](https://vyzma.in/services/ai-chatbots): GPT-4o & Claude-powered conversational agents for 24/7 customer support, WhatsApp automation, and lead qualification
- [Workflow Automation](https://vyzma.in/services/workflow-automation): AI-powered automation connecting CRM, email, documents, and 500+ business apps
- [SEO & AI Search (AEO/GEO)](https://vyzma.in/services/seo-aeo-geo): Google rankings plus citations in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude
- [Voice AI](https://vyzma.in/services/voice-ai): Natural voice agents for customer calls, IVR replacement, and multilingual support (Hindi, Telugu, English)
- [Custom AI Development](https://vyzma.in/services/custom-ai): Bespoke ML models, RAG systems, and fine-tuned LLMs for specific business requirements
- [Website Design](https://vyzma.in/services/website-design): Next.js websites with sub-2 second loads, SEO foundations, and AI integrations
- [Google Ads](https://vyzma.in/services/google-ads): Data-driven PPC campaigns optimised for ROAS across search, display, and shopping
- [Meta Ads](https://vyzma.in/services/meta-ads): Facebook & Instagram advertising with creative development and audience targeting
